693900000000000000000100 description: Listen up. You don't earn a place in DEVGRU and gain access to one of the most elite arsenals in the U.S. military by walking in off the street. Every operator has proven themselves where failure isn't an option. Normally, I'd send you packing. But the situation in the Norvinsk Special Economic Zone has stretched our manpower to the breaking point. I'm still waiting on your case file from Command. I don't know if you were former Army infantry or possibly Rangers; but we've heard your name, and you've managed to survive where most don't. That's enough to earn our attention—not your trident. You'll operate as an independent contractor under our direction. Complete your assignments, follow orders, and prove you're more than another gun for hire. Earn it, and we'll revisit your future with DEVGRU. Gear up, operator. Your first task starts now. SOCOM keeps a forward inventory for units moving through the region, but supply lines are currently blocked. We need to deploy a fire team on a two-day operation to reopen a logistics corridor, but we're running low on rations. Bring in field rations and clean water so Team 5 can sustain longer operations.
693900000000000000000100 startedMessageT: Logistics win wars. Get the rations and water to the armory. No excuses.
693900000000000000000100 successMessageT: You followed orders and got the job done. Team 5 put those rations and water to use, and logistics is moving again because of it. Command is assigning you to Team 7 as a contractor. You have special permission to wear the Team 7 patch for blue-on-blue identification, but do not don the Trident just yet. You have basic access to the SOCOM Armory now; keep proving you belong here.
693900000000000000000100 failMessageText: You failed the assignment. Operators don't get second chances in the field.
693900000000000000000200 description: Good work on the rations. Team 5 put those supplies to use and punched a hole through the enemy line, which bought our people room to move. Command is assigning you to Team 7 as a contractor. You have special permission to wear the Team 7 patch for blue-on-blue identification. I know it's not the Trident, but at least you now have basic access to the SOCOM Armory; keep proving you belong here. The SOCOM mechanical unit is in dire need of tools to repair logistical vehicles damaged in the recent conflict when supply chains were blocked. We need you to go to the Ground Zero region of Tarkov, search for any items of use, and take out any enemy resistance you encounter. Bring back BEAR dog tags as proof of enemy KIA.
693900000000000000000200 startedMessageT: Move to Ground Zero, eliminate BEAR PMCs and Scavs, recover a toolset, and bring back level 10 or higher BEAR dog tags.
693900000000000000000200 successMessageT: Confirmed. The enemy presence in Ground Zero is reduced, and the mechanical unit has the tools and proof of contact they requested.
693900000000000000000200 failMessageText: You missed the objective. SOCOM logistics cannot move on good intentions.
693900000000000000000200 declinePlayerMe: Negative. I can't support that tasking.
693900000000000000000200 completePlayerM: Objective complete. Tools and dog tags delivered.
693900000000000000000205: Eliminate BEAR PMCs on Ground Zero
69390000000000000000020a: Hand over found in raid toolset
69390000000000000000020b: Hand over level 10+ BEAR dog tags. Command needs enemy KIA confirmation.
693900000000000000000300 startedMessageT: Suppressors are issued from the armory. Move to Customs with a DDM4 V7 and eliminate ten Scavs quietly.
693900000000000000000300 successMessageT: Clean work. The route is quieter, and our teams can move without every scav in the district looking their way. The DD Soundguard suppressor is available for armory purchase once you gain level 2 access to the armory.
693900000000000000000300 failMessageText: You made too much noise and missed the objective. That is not how we support Tier 1 assets.
693900000000000000000300 acceptPlayerMes: Roger. I will keep it quiet.
693900000000000000000300 declinePlayerMe: Negative. I cannot take that assignment.
693900000000000000000300 completePlayerM: Objective complete. Ten Scavs eliminated on Customs.
693900000000000000000300 description: Your efforts paid off. The mechanical unit got the logistical vehicles back in operation, and our teams can move supplies and personnel once again. Civilian rebels are interfering with Tier 1 movement routes, watching checkpoints, and creating much unneeded chaos for SOCOM operations. We need you to eliminate enemy rebel insurgents. Keep the signature low and the work clean.
693900000000000000000305: Eliminate Scavs on Customs using a suppressed DDM4 V7
693900000000000000000400 description: Local rebels and one of their established crime bosses Reshala, are causing SOCOM a whole lot of heartburn. They have a base of operations set up somewhere in the Customs region, and their communications infrastructure is keeping them coordinated. I need you to gather any intelligence on that network you can get your hands on and elimiate their local crime boss from the equation. Quiet or loud, I do not care. Just make sure he stops being a problem.
693900000000000000000400 startedMessageT: Customs is the target area. Collect the intel, hard drives, and flash drive, then eliminate Reshala.
693900000000000000000400 successMessageT: Good work. Reshala is off the board, and the intel gives us a cleaner picture of how these rebels are talking to each other. More importantly, it points us toward a communications tower they have been using to coordinate movement through Customs. That is our next target.
693900000000000000000400 failMessageText: You missed the objective. Their network stays intact, and Reshala keeps making noise for our teams.
693900000000000000000400 acceptPlayerMes: Roger. I will recover the intel and remove Reshala.
693900000000000000000400 declinePlayerMe: Negative. I cannot support that operation.
693900000000000000000400 completePlayerM: Objective complete. Intel delivered and Reshala eliminated.
693900000000000000000402: Hand over found in raid Intelligence folder
693900000000000000000403: Hand over found in raid hard drives
693900000000000000000404: Hand over found in raid secure flash drive
693900000000000000000500 description: The intelligence you recovered from Reshala's network gave us what we needed: a likely communications tower keeping the insurgent cell coordinated through Customs. The next operation requires a level of deniability that SOCOM cannot provide through official channels. That is where you come in. You have earned enough trust for us to put you on contract for this assignment. If you are compromised, captured, or killed, the United States Government will deny any knowledge of your existence or this operation. Plan accordingly, keep your head down, and keep your mouth shut. Move on the tower, disrupt their communications network, inflict maximum casualties on their fighting force, and recover any intelligence of value from enemy personnel. Every crumb of digital intelligence you recover brings us one step closer to dismantling their organization.
693900000000000000000500 startedMessageT: You're on contract now. Take the issued Signal Jammer to the tower identified from Reshala's intel, disrupt their comms, hit their fighters, and recover the phones.
693900000000000000000500 successMessageT: Confirmed. Their network is disrupted, their fighters are down, and the intelligence is in our hands. Good work. Collect the MK18 SOCOM package from the armory.
693900000000000000000500 failMessageText: You failed the contract. SOCOM cannot acknowledge this operation.
693900000000000000000500 declinePlayerMe: Negative. I can't take this contract.
693900000000000000000500 completePlayerM: Contract complete. Phones recovered and jammer planted.
693900000000000000000505: Eliminate Scavs across Tarkov, excluding Factory using any DDM4 weapon variant
693900000000000000000506: Hand over found in raid GPhones, 1GPhones, or GPhone X smartphones
693900000000000000000507: Plant a Signal Jammer at the Customs radio tower
693900000000000000000600 description: Thanks to your efforts jamming enemy communications and gathering digital breadcrumbs, SOCOM intelligence officers, with help from CIA assets, were able to piece together what we now believe is an inside leak. We do not know who the insider is yet, but we know who is feeding them intelligence and causing SEAL teams around Tarkov so many casualties. A former group of U.S. Tier 1 operators known as The Goons are the source of this intelligence. Get on a bird and infil into the Lighthouse region of Tarkov for a high-risk night operation between 20:00 and 06:00. I should warn you, these former Tier 1 Operators are bad dudes, they are the real deal so be careful. Grab a DDM4 MK18 or MK18 SOCOM variant, eliminate the group known as the Goons and any hostile insurgents in the area. I am issuing three sets of NVGs from the armory for the operation.
693900000000000000000600 startedMessageT: Night operation authorized. Three sets of NVGs are issued. Infil Lighthouse with a MK18 or MK18 SOCOM variant, eliminate The Goons and five Rogues after dark, and clear Scavs around the cottages.
693900000000000000000600 successMessageT: Confirmed. Knight, Big Pipe, BirdEye, and the Rogue element are off the board, and the cottage area is clear enough for our people to move. SOCOM and CIA will keep pulling on the leak from here. Your hazard pay and armory package are approved.
693900000000000000000600 failMessageText: You missed the window. The Goons stay active, and our teams keep bleeding from compromised intelligence.
693900000000000000000600 acceptPlayerMes: Roger. I will infil Lighthouse and remove The Goons.
693900000000000000000600 declinePlayerMe: Negative. I cannot support that night operation.
693900000000000000000600 completePlayerM: Objective complete. The Goons are down, the Rogues are reduced, and the cottages are clear.
693900000000000000000605: Eliminate Knight on Lighthouse between 20:00 and 06:00 using a DDM4 MK18 or MK18 SOCOM variant
693900000000000000000609: Eliminate Big Pipe on Lighthouse between 20:00 and 06:00 using a DDM4 MK18 or MK18 SOCOM variant
69390000000000000000060d: Eliminate BirdEye on Lighthouse between 20:00 and 06:00 using a DDM4 MK18 or MK18 SOCOM variant
693900000000000000000611: Eliminate Scavs on Lighthousebetween 20:00 and 06:00 MK18 or DDM4 MK18 SOCOM variant
693900000000000000000615: Eliminate Rogues on Lighthouse between 20:00 and 06:00 using a DDM4 MK18 or MK18 SOCOM variant
693900000000000000000700 description: The situation on the ground is changing fast. Team 7 is a man short and they are pinned down in the Customs terminal and industrial sector of the Norvinsk Special Economic Zone. They need immediate QRF. The enemy isn't a bunch of civilians or scared conscripts. They're seasoned BEAR veterans, many of them former Spetsnaz, and they know this terrain. Don't underestimate them. Remember your target identification and watch your fire. Friendly elements are operating in the area. Do not kill any USEC PMCs. Grab any DDM4 variant available to you in the armory, move to Customs, and get in the fight.
693900000000000000000700 startedMessageT: Team 7 is still taking fire. Move to Customs, engage BEAR forces, and bring back proof. Do not kill any USEC PMCs.
693900000000000000000700 successMessageT: Confirmed. Team 7 is still in the fight because you did your job. Command approved your final armory access and a serious hazard payout. You've earned it.
693900000000000000000700 failMessageText: You missed the window. Team 7 needed QRF, not excuses.
693900000000000000000700 completePlayerM: Objective complete. BEAR dog tags delivered.
693900000000000000000705: Eliminate BEAR PMCs on Customs using any DDM4 variant
693900000000000000000706: Hand over level 30+ BEAR dog tags. Command needs enemy KIA confirmation.
693900000000000000000711: Do not kill any USEC PMCs
693900000000000000000712: Do not kill any USEC PMCs
693900000000000000000713: Do not kill any USEC PMCs
693900000000000000000800 description: Great work providing QRF to Team 7, you really saved our necks out there. Without your combat skills and quick thinking, it is hard to say what casualties we might have suffered out there. You have more than proven yourself. Welcome to SEAL Team 7, and congratulations are in order. Repeat after me, soldier: "My Trident is a symbol of honor and heritage. Bestowed upon me by the heroes that have gone before, it embodies the trust of those I have sworn to protect. By wearing the Trident I accept the responsibility of my chosen profession and way of life. It is a privilege that I must earn every day." Hold on, FNG, do not get too excited. Before we hand over the keys to your gear cage and give you full access to the most sophisticated armory in the world, we need to initiate you properly. Sorry buddy, but you have to do the Beer Run as a gesture of camaraderie.
693900000000000000000800 startedMessageT: Bring back six found in raid beers for Team 7. No substitutions.
693900000000000000000800 successMessageT: Now you are speaking our language. Beer delivered, badge issued, and your final armory access is approved.
693900000000000000000800 failMessageText: You failed the Beer Run. That is not how you make friends in Team 7.
693900000000000000000800 declinePlayerMe: Negative. I cannot support that request.
693900000000000000000802: Hand over found in raid beer
